what_changed.text: AI integration expanded into non-traditional industries, notably entertainment, reflecting a broader adoption beyond core technology sectors.

strategic_signal.signal: AI integration expanding into non-traditional industries
strategic_signal.description: AI partnerships and deployments are increasingly extending beyond traditional technology sectors into industries such as entertainment, signaling a broadening scope of AI application.
strategic_signal.watch_next_week: Monitor new AI partnerships and deployments in additional non-technology sectors.

why_it_matters.text: This expansion opens new market opportunities and competitive dynamics for technology providers and industry incumbents outside traditional AI domains.
